---
title: "todavia no se"
author: "Eva Kennedy y Antonia Cea"
format: html
editor: visual
---

}holahola nose q hare aqui

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(psych)
library(haven)
library(readxl)

ELSOC17 <- read_dta("ELSOC_W02_v3.00_Stata14.dta")
View(ELSOC17)







```

sdkv\<sd
